title: Croatian Fermented Broth Soup
description: A simple and comforting Croatian soup made with fermented ingredients. Serve with crusty bread for a hearty meal.
instructions: In a large pot, bring the Croatian Fermented Broth to a boil.
Add the sliced Silky Doner Meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the meat is tender.
Stir in chopped Fresh Parsley and season with Salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
